---
created: "TIMESTAMP"
id: task-ID
key: TASK_KEY
state: draft
tags:
    - sv0
title: TASK_TITLE
type: task
---

# TASK_TITLE

## purpose

<!-- describe what this task accomplishes and why it matters -->

## dependencies

/require: sml
/require: cc

## configuration

/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SV0VM_ROOT=sv0vm
/env: BUILD_DIR=build

## steps

/ai: outline the implementation approach for this task.

<!-- add /run: directives referencing scripts in the companion folder -->

## validation

<!-- add /assert: directives to verify the task completed correctly -->
